text:
project, collaborative enterprise, frequently involving research or design, that is carefully planned to achieve a particular aim, also known as effort, programme, program, programs. Attributes include: 
- Commons category: "Projects"
- properties for this type: "has goal",
 "main subject",
 "inception"
- has characteristic: "goal",
 "team",
 "project stakeholder",
 "project scope"
- different from: "science project"
- studied by: "feasibility study",
 "program evaluation"
